textByHashes.45169ee14abac46e61e4208d1e3c52ac0a96f30e: Got a medpack? I feel terrible.
textByHashes.16ed526c8ea4093be7407a5d6447e684a82eb3c7: Lizardman bite. There's always a fever after you've been bitten by one of those. I'm sure they don't clean their teeth.
textByHashes.25f9d35010aaf9332f21498bae26f3e8f7c99b5c: Try looking in the storage tents outside.
textByHashes.b3c2d9affd752db9f6385cf50dd47b69a9f13be8: Thanks for the medpack. I'm feeling a lot better now.
textByHashes.5e340536c0bcb0226016de9d3553f6d57b3e7551: While you're here, you could help the war effort by fetching medpacks for my sick comrades. There'll be some in the storage tents outside.
textByHashes.d882ea3247629d7624e4b35b1ed97137b8113d06: Gimme a medpack - I need my strength back.
textByHashes.9af2678f7a39cd417d68d5f75af812f48d7ec593: What happened to me is nothing compared to what's gonna happen to the filthy lizardman who did it. When I'm out of here, I'm gonna find him and fix him good.
textByHashes.6984204021f32a9fe58fa7ccd8aff379af2a3dc0: Cheers. When I get back on my feet, there's gonna be one sorry lizardman out there.
textByHashes.3421cb3d4272b19e01f8a78b27194dcae70af42f: Those lizardmen gotta die! Ya hear me? I want them all dead! All of 'em!
textByHashes.51cc1d601c23b064fe15052a463f51a3a174a99f: Those ruffians hit me pretty hard. Have you got a medpack?
textByHashes.2dd96a4c340171df8e3a437a421f26ec3ac11470: Gangsters. I was on patrol in the docklands, but those Piscarilius scumbags lured me into an alley and hit me with a stick.
textByHashes.a535135964e479409df6cdd47ce553b6537bc22a: Thanks. Hopefully I'll be back on patrol again soon.
textByHashes.172428815a74a882ccc671b8e22ad106e5322083: We'll never keep on top of the crime in this kingdom at this rate. Maybe you could help deal with some gangsters while you're in Kourend.
textByHashes.3e4b8ea124cdc10b67fd160aeb2378b564f29eba: I'm alright now. Try another soldier.
